title: TW Question 5 Mock Quiz (Graph Description Quiz)
description: This quiz trains graph-description writing for the 25-mark final exam question.

title: TW Question 4 Mock Quiz (Process Description Quiz)
description: This quiz trains process-description writing for the 25-mark final exam question. It covers process structure, passive voice, transitions, overview sentences and model-answer checking.

title: TW Question 3 Mock Quiz (Summary Gap Filling Quiz)
description: This quiz trains the exact Q3 skill: read the passage, understand the summary, and fill missing gaps using the correct word or phrase.

title: TW Question 2 Mock Quiz (Reading Comprehension Advanced)
description: This advanced quiz is made for the second reading comprehension question. It uses longer passages, closer distractors, and more exam-style traps.

title: TW Question 1 Mock Quiz (Reading Comprehension)
description: This quiz covers  True/False/Not Given, MCQ, Matching Headings, Sentence Completion, Note Completion, Table Completion and Flowchart Completion.
